about.title: About
error.jsonSchemaInvalid: The project file schema is not supported ({0}).
error.jsonVersionInvalid: The project file schema version is not supported (version {0}). Please update the app.
error.timeoutShorterThanInterval: Timeout ms must be at least as large as polling interval ms.
menu.errorCorrection.option.H.tooltip: Recovers up to about 30%. Stronger recovery, but the QR code becomes denser and may be harder to scan.
menu.errorCorrection.option.L.tooltip: Recovers up to about 7%. Best for screen display, with the coarsest and easiest-to-scan QR code.
menu.errorCorrection.option.M.tooltip: Recovers up to about 15%. Balanced for normal use.
menu.errorCorrection.option.Q.tooltip: Recovers up to about 25%. Use for printing or when some dirt is expected.
menu.errorCorrection.tooltip: Recovery strength when a QR code is partly damaged or dirty. Higher levels recover better but make the QR denser.
menu.qr.tooltip: Configure QR chunking, display size, and error correction level. Compression is fixed to Zstd.
menu.qrChunkSize.option.350.tooltip: Prioritizes scan reliability. Creates more pages, but each QR code is coarser.
menu.qrChunkSize.option.500.tooltip: Leans toward easier scanning. Uses slightly more pages with coarser QR codes.
menu.qrChunkSize.option.800.tooltip: Default setting. Balances page count and scan readability.
menu.qrChunkSize.option.1200.tooltip: For minimizing page count. QR codes become denser and may be harder to scan.
menu.qrChunkSize.tooltip: Characters per QR page. Smaller values create more pages but easier-to-read QR codes.
menu.qrDisplaySize.option.600.tooltip: Small display size. Use when screen space is limited.
menu.qrDisplaySize.option.800.tooltip: Medium display size. Suitable for typical laptop screens.
menu.qrDisplaySize.option.1200.tooltip: Large display size. Use when scanning from farther away.
menu.qrDisplaySize.tooltip: QR image size on screen. Adjust for the scanner device and display size.

tooltip.moveDeviceUp: Move selected device rows up. Alt+Up also works.
tooltip.moveTrapDown: Move selected trap rows down. Alt+Down also works.

tooltip.moveWatchUp: Move selected time chart rows up. Alt+Up also works.
